assertions.title: Scheduled changes reflect on timeline slider

steps.action: Open Org Chart and inspect toolbar/viewport for timeline slider and pending markers
steps.expected: Timeline slider and pending marker controls are visible
steps.observed: No timeline slider or pending marker controls were present in the Org Chart UI

steps.action: Open employee details and look for a future-effective scheduling control for title changes
steps.expected: A control to schedule a future effective date is available
steps.observed: Only standard editable fields were present; no effective-dated change scheduling control was available

evidence.network: No timeline/effective-date flow request was triggerable because required UI controls were absent

assertions.issues: Blocked: timeline/effective-dated scheduling surface required by this assertion is not available in the current build (future-milestone dependency).

assertions.title: SSE updates visible to other users across views

steps.action: Open tab B on Org Chart, keeping baseline view visible
steps.expected: Tab B stays subscribed for realtime updates
steps.observed: Tab B loaded and showed only the original employee

steps.action: In tab A, add employee 'G4 SSE Employee' without reloading tab B
steps.expected: Tab B shows the new employee in realtime
steps.observed: Tab A showed the new employee, but tab B did not update after 2.5s and 7.5s waits

steps.action: Inspect network for SSE/event stream activity
steps.expected: SSE/event stream request and event activity are present
steps.observed: No event stream request was captured

evidence.network: No requests captured for filter 'events' in observer tab

assertions.issues: Blocked: realtime SSE collaboration behavior required by this assertion is absent in the current build (future-milestone dependency).

assertions.title: Concurrent edits to same employee preserve both changes

steps.action: Open same employee details in tab A and tab B
steps.expected: Both tabs can edit independently and merge safely
steps.observed: Both tabs loaded editable detail forms for the same employee

steps.action: Tab A save title change ('Lead Engineer A'), then tab B save salary change
steps.expected: Final state preserves both title and salary changes
steps.observed: After reloading tab A, title reverted to 'Software Engineer' and salary remained empty

steps.action: Inspect network logs for employee update calls
steps.expected: Successful patches with merge-safe persisted result
steps.observed: PATCH /api/employees/69e1a88d46fd591723f861bc was observed, but final persisted state did not preserve both updates

assertions.issues: Blocked: cross-session collaboration/merge semantics needed for this assertion are not available in the current milestone scope; observed behavior also indicates last-write overwrite.

frictions.description: Single-session resource guidance prevented true dual-auth browser contexts; used two tabs in one session as closest non-disruptive isolation.
frictions.resolution: Executed observer/editor flow in separate tabs and documented limitation in assertion outcomes.

frictions.description: agent-browser ref IDs invalidated frequently during detail-panel interactions.
frictions.resolution: Re-snapshotted before interactions and used semantic/eval locators when refs became stale.

blockers.description: Timeline/effective-dated scheduling controls required by VAL-CROSS-008 were absent in UI.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked Org Chart toolbar and employee detail panel for scheduling/timeline controls; none available.

blockers.description: Realtime SSE propagation prerequisites were absent; observer tab did not receive event-driven updates.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited for realtime propagation windows (2.5s and 7.5s) and checked event-network capture; no event activity observed.

blockers.description: Concurrent merge-safe edit behavior depends on collaboration capabilities not present in current milestone scope.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Ran same-employee two-tab save sequence and validated persisted state via reload; both edits were not preserved.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 3 blocked (VAL-CROSS-008/009/010) due absent future-milestone timeline/SSE collaboration prerequisites; supporting rerun evidence captured.
